contractScope: help, add, list commands with local JSON persistence

checks.name: help_output_clarity
checks.evidence: show_help() displays clear usage, commands, and examples. Handles -h/--help aliases.

checks.name: add_command_behavior
checks.evidence: cmd_add() joins args into task text, generates unique ID via max(id)+1, persists, and confirms with output.

checks.name: list_command_behavior
checks.evidence: cmd_list() loads all tasks and displays each with [id] text format. Shows 'No tasks found.' when empty.

checks.name: storage_correctness
checks.evidence: load_tasks()/save_tasks() use ~/.todo-cli/tasks.json. Auto-creates directory. Handles missing/corrupted file by returning [].

checks.name: error_handling
checks.evidence: Missing args to add: prints error with usage and exits(1). Unknown command: prints error and suggests help.

checks.name: maintainability
checks.evidence: Clear separation: cli.py handles arguments/storage.py handles I/O. No external dependencies. Type hints on storage functions.

observations: ID generation correctly uses max(task['id']) + 1 ensuring uniqueness after deletions (if implemented later).
Storage gracefully handles JSON decode errors and IO errors by returning empty list.
No speculative features (done/delete/clear) present per contract.
